title: FunnelPromote
description: funnel.promote — move an entry between stages. Atomic os.Rename on POSIX. The daemon enforces the transition table: forward-only along triage → plans → next-up → executing → completions → archive, plus archive-from-anywhere as a kill switch. All other transitions return funnel.invalid_transition.

name.description: Entry basename to promote. Must already exist under rommel/<from>/.

mtime.description: Modification timestamp of the entry after the move. Same value as before the rename — os.Rename does not touch mtime.
